settings.sub_headline: Wear the Heat. Own the Night.
settings.hero_description: FireBorn is a fashion brand built for those who refuse to fade. Each piece is forged in bold design, raw energy, and unapologetic style.

settings.title: Shop The
settings.banner_desc: A signature piece built to turn heads. Limited units. No restock.

settings.headline: We Don't Follow Trends. We Burn Them.

settings.quote: I never thought a navy jacket could hit this hard. The orange tag detail is unreal — everyone asks where I got it.
settings.name: Jordan K.

settings.quote: FireBorn changed how I dress. The fit is immaculate and the energy is just different. Blaze collection is everything.
settings.name: Aaliya M.

settings.quote: Ordered the steel grey hoodie — arrived in 2 days. Premium quality, perfect aesthetic. Repping FireBorn every day.
settings.name: Devin R.
